examples.sentence: Whenever I try to solve the puzzle, the answer just doesn't come to my mind.
examples.translation: Whenever I try to solve the puzzle, the answer just doesn't come to my mind.

examples.sentence: Did it ever come to your mind that she might be innocent?
examples.translation: Did it ever come to your mind that she might be innocent?

examples.sentence: It hadn't occurred to me at the time, but now the solution is clear to my mind.
examples.translation: It hadn't occurred to me at the time, but now the solution is clear to my mind.

examples.sentence: To my mind, the new policy will benefit everyone involved.
examples.translation: In my opinion, the new policy will benefit everyone involved.

examples.sentence: If it were up to your mind, would you change the way we handle this project?
examples.translation: If it were up to your opinion, would you change the way we handle this project?

examples.sentence: She always speaks from her own mind, which makes her arguments quite convincing.
examples.translation: She always speaks from her own opinion, which makes her arguments quite convincing.

examples.sentence: Last night, the idea suddenly came to my mind while I was trying to sleep.
examples.translation: Last night, the idea suddenly came to my mind while I was trying to sleep.

examples.sentence: The memory of that day returned to his mind as he walked through the old neighborhood.
examples.translation: The memory of that day returned to his mind as he walked through the old neighborhood.

examples.sentence: Nothing seems to come to her mind when asked about the incident.
examples.translation: Nothing seems to come to her mind when asked about the incident.

examples.sentence: If a better solution comes to your mind, please let me know immediately.
examples.translation: If a better solution comes to your mind, please let me know immediately.

examples.sentence: The new sports car was too rich for my blood, so I decided to save up more money first.
examples.translation: The new sports car was too expensive for me, so I decided to save up more money first.

examples.sentence: Wouldn't that designer handbag be too rich for your blood? Maybe look for a cheaper brand.
examples.translation: Wouldn't that designer handbag be too expensive for you? Maybe look for a cheaper brand.

examples.sentence: Last year, the cost of the vacation was too rich for their blood, but this year they managed to afford it.
examples.translation: Last year, the cost of the vacation was too expensive for them, but this year they managed to afford it.

examples.sentence: The amount of overtime the boss expects is too rich for my blood; I need better work-life balance.
examples.translation: The amount of overtime the boss expects is more than I am willing to accept; I need better work-life balance.

examples.sentence: When Sarah heard about the new rules, she said the restrictions were too rich for her blood and quit immediately.
examples.translation: When Sarah heard about the new rules, she said the restrictions were more than she was willing to tolerate and quit immediately.

examples.sentence: I can handle a lot, but that level of criticism is just too rich for my blood.
examples.translation: I can handle a lot, but that level of criticism is more than I am willing to accept.

examples.sentence: The price tag on that luxury watch was simply too rich for my blood, so I walked away.
examples.translation: The price tag on that luxury watch was simply too expensive for me, so I walked away.

examples.sentence: They found the monthly fees too rich for their blood and canceled their membership.
examples.translation: They found the monthly fees too expensive for them and canceled their membership.

examples.sentence: If the tuition costs are too rich for your blood, you might consider applying for scholarships.
examples.translation: If the tuition costs are too expensive for you, you might consider applying for scholarships.

examples.sentence: The renovation expenses turned out to be too rich for our blood, so we postponed the project.
examples.translation: The renovation expenses turned out to be too expensive for us, so we postponed the project.

examples.sentence: The two teams fought tooth-and-nail for the championship title, leaving everything on the field.
examples.translation: The two teams fought with fierce determination for the championship title, leaving everything on the field.

examples.sentence: I had to defend my project tooth-and-nail to convince the board to approve the funding.
examples.translation: I had to defend my project with intense effort to convince the board to approve the funding.

examples.sentence: They will fight tooth-and-nail to protect their territory from any intruders.
examples.translation: They will fight with fierce determination to protect their territory from any intruders.

examples.sentence: She worked tooth-and-nail to finish the report before the deadline, barely taking any breaks.
examples.translation: She worked with fierce determination to finish the report before the deadline, barely taking any breaks.

examples.sentence: The soldiers were tooth-and-nail in their defense of the strategic position.
examples.translation: The soldiers were with intense effort in their defense of the strategic position.

examples.sentence: He is tooth-and-nail committed to improving the company's performance this quarter.
examples.translation: He is with fierce determination committed to improving the company's performance this quarter.

examples.sentence: Fighting tooth-and-nail against the unfair policies, the activists organized protests across the city.
examples.translation: Fighting with fierce determination against the unfair policies, the activists organized protests across the city.

examples.sentence: Once the email was sent to all clients, the toothpaste was out of the tube and the mistake couldn't be undone.
examples.translation: Once the email was sent to all clients, the fact was irreversible and the mistake couldn't be undone.

examples.sentence: He realized the toothpaste was out of the tube when the rumors started spreading after his comment.
examples.translation: He realized the situation was irreversible when the rumors started spreading after his comment.

examples.sentence: Trying to take back her words was pointless — the toothpaste was out of the tube by then.
examples.translation: Trying to take back her words was pointless — the situation was irreversible by then.

examples.sentence: After squeezing the toothpaste out of the tube, it cannot be put back in, just like that confidential report once leaked.
examples.translation: After squeezing the toothpaste out of the tube, it cannot be put back in, just like that confidential report once leaked.

examples.sentence: The toothpaste was out of the tube when the secret was revealed at the meeting, causing lasting consequences.
examples.translation: The situation was irreversible when the secret was revealed at the meeting, causing lasting consequences.

examples.sentence: Once you open the toothpaste tube, it’s out and will soon be gone, similar to how words once spoken can't be retracted.
examples.translation: Once you open the toothpaste tube, it’s out and will soon be gone, similar to how words once spoken can't be retracted.

examples.sentence: The toothpaste is out of the tube, meaning the decision has been made and there's no turning back now.
examples.translation: The toothpaste is out of the tube, meaning the decision has been made and there's no turning back now.

examples.sentence: I don't mean to toot my own horn, but I managed to close the deal single-handedly.
examples.translation: I don't mean to boast, but I managed to close the deal single-handedly.

examples.sentence: Whenever Tom toots his own horn about his achievements, people tend to roll their eyes.
examples.translation: Whenever Tom boasts about his achievements, people tend to roll their eyes.

examples.sentence: She was reluctant to toot her own horn, but her promotion was well deserved.
examples.translation: She was reluctant to boast, but her promotion was well deserved.

examples.sentence: John tooted his own horn loudly at the party, talking about his recent awards.
examples.translation: John boasted loudly at the party, talking about his recent awards.

examples.sentence: The musician toots his own horn in every interview, highlighting his chart-topping hits.
examples.translation: The musician boasts in every interview, highlighting his chart-topping hits.

examples.sentence: She toots her own horn about her cooking skills, but her family knows the truth.
examples.translation: She boasts about her cooking skills, but her family knows the truth.

examples.sentence: I heard you tooted your own horn during the meeting; humility goes a long way, you know.
examples.translation: I heard you boasted during the meeting; humility goes a long way, you know.

examples.sentence: Her suitcase was packed to overflowing, making it difficult to close the zipper.
examples.translation: Her suitcase was packed so full that it was difficult to close the zipper.

examples.sentence: The cup was filled to overflowing, spilling coffee onto the table.
examples.translation: The cup was filled so much that coffee spilled onto the table.

examples.sentence: During the festival, the streets were to overflowing with excited visitors from all over the country.
examples.translation: During the festival, the streets were filled beyond capacity with excited visitors from all over the country.

examples.sentence: The inbox was to overflowing after the announcement, with hundreds of emails arriving within minutes.
examples.translation: The inbox was filled beyond capacity after the announcement, with hundreds of emails arriving within minutes.

examples.sentence: The garden was to overflowing with blooming flowers, creating a breathtaking sight.
examples.translation: The garden was abundant to an extreme degree with blooming flowers, creating a breathtaking sight.

examples.sentence: Her heart was to overflowing with joy when she finally reunited with her childhood friends.
examples.translation: Her heart was extremely full of joy when she finally reunited with her childhood friends.

examples.sentence: The pantry was to overflowing with food donations after the community drive.
examples.translation: The pantry was abundant to an extreme degree with food donations after the community drive.

examples.sentence: Tears streamed down her face, her emotions to overflowing as she heard the good news.
examples.translation: Tears streamed down her face, her emotions so strong that they seemed uncontrollable as she heard the good news.

examples.sentence: The bucket was to overflowing with water, dripping onto the floor below.
examples.translation: The bucket was so full that water was spilling onto the floor below.

examples.sentence: His gratitude was to overflowing, expressed in heartfelt words and gestures.
examples.translation: His gratitude was so strong that it seemed excessive, expressed in heartfelt words and gestures.

examples.sentence: The vase was to overflowing with freshly cut flowers, almost tipping over from the weight.
examples.translation: The vase was so full of freshly cut flowers that it was almost tipping over from the weight.

examples.sentence: In the old vaudeville show, the top banana always gets the biggest laugh from the audience.
examples.translation: In the old vaudeville show, the principal comedian always gets the biggest laugh from the audience.

examples.sentence: During the comedy night, Jerry played the top banana role, leading the act with witty jokes.
examples.translation: During the comedy night, Jerry played the lead comic role, leading the act with witty jokes.

examples.sentence: They hired a new top banana for the circus, who stole the show with his hilarious antics.
examples.translation: They hired a new principal comedian for the circus, who stole the show with his hilarious antics.

examples.sentence: After years of hard work, she finally became the top banana in the company.
examples.translation: After years of hard work, she finally became the most important person in the company.

examples.sentence: Everyone looks up to Dan because he's the top banana around here.
examples.translation: Everyone looks up to Dan because he's the dominant person around here.

examples.sentence: The top banana made the final decision on the budget allocations.
examples.translation: The person with primary authority made the final decision on the budget allocations.

examples.sentence: In the talent show, Mia was the top banana, captivating the judges with her performance.
examples.translation: In the talent show, Mia was the chief performer, captivating the judges with her performance.

examples.sentence: The troupe’s top banana rehearsed tirelessly to perfect the lead role.
examples.translation: The troupe’s chief performer rehearsed tirelessly to perfect the lead role.

examples.sentence: He was recognized as the top banana of the acting ensemble for his outstanding role.
examples.translation: He was recognized as the principal comedian of the acting ensemble for his outstanding role.

examples.sentence: The top banana in the comedy club always has the best timing and delivery.
examples.translation: The principal comedian in the comedy club always has the best timing and delivery.

examples.sentence: At the show, the top banana's jokes had everyone laughing non-stop.
examples.translation: At the show, the lead comic's jokes had everyone laughing non-stop.

examples.sentence: They promoted him to top banana after he impressed the audience with his solo act.
examples.translation: They promoted him to principal comedian after he impressed the audience with his solo act.

examples.sentence: The top banana carried the show, making it a memorable night for all attendees.
examples.translation: The principal comedian carried the show, making it a memorable night for all attendees.

examples.sentence: In the neighborhood, Mrs. Jenkins was the top cat, known for her influence and wisdom.
examples.translation: In the neighborhood, Mrs. Jenkins was the leading person, known for her influence and wisdom.

examples.sentence: Everyone respects Carlos because he's the top cat in the local business community.
examples.translation: Everyone respects Carlos because he's the most influential person in the local business community.

examples.sentence: When it comes to decision-making, the top cat always gets the final say around here.
examples.translation: When it comes to decision-making, the leading person always gets the final say around here.

examples.sentence: The gang's top cat was arrested last night during the police raid.
examples.translation: The gang's boss was arrested last night during the police raid.

examples.sentence: Nobody challenges the top cat's authority in this crew; he's the one in control.
examples.translation: Nobody challenges the boss's authority in this crew; he's the one in control.

examples.sentence: As the top cat, she managed all operations and assigned tasks to her team efficiently.
examples.translation: As the boss, she managed all operations and assigned tasks to her team efficiently.

examples.sentence: He strutted into the room like the top cat, confident and commanding attention.
examples.translation: He strutted into the room like the dominant figure, confident and commanding attention.

examples.sentence: Being the top cat at the club gave her a certain swagger that others envied.
examples.translation: Being the dominant figure at the club gave her a certain swagger that others envied.

examples.sentence: The top cat always knew how to make his presence felt in any social gathering.
examples.translation: The dominant person always knew how to make his presence felt in any social gathering.

examples.sentence: The top cat in the community organized the annual charity event with great success.
examples.translation: The leading person in the community organized the annual charity event with great success.

examples.sentence: She became the top cat after years of dedication and leadership among her peers.
examples.translation: She became the leading person after years of dedication and leadership among her peers.

examples.sentence: Our club's top cat ensures that everyone's voice is heard during meetings.
examples.translation: Our club's leading person ensures that everyone's voice is heard during meetings.

examples.sentence: The top cat of the neighborhood association handled all disputes fairly and decisively.
examples.translation: The leading person of the neighborhood association handled all disputes fairly and decisively.

examples.sentence: After the promotion, he was clearly the top dog in the office, making all major decisions.
examples.translation: After the promotion, he was clearly the dominant person in the office, making all major decisions.

examples.sentence: Don't forget who the top dog is when negotiating the contract; that person has the final say.
examples.translation: Don't forget who the dominant person is when negotiating the contract; that person has the final say.

examples.sentence: The new manager quickly established herself as the top dog among the team members.
examples.translation: The new manager quickly established herself as the dominant person among the team members.

examples.sentence: In the tournament, Lisa was the top dog, winning every match with ease.
examples.translation: In the tournament, Lisa was the winner, winning every match with ease.

examples.sentence: The startup became the top dog in the industry within just a few years of operation.
examples.translation: The startup became the most successful competitor in the industry within just a few years of operation.

examples.sentence: Being the top dog in the market means you have to constantly innovate to stay ahead.
examples.translation: Being the winner in the market means you have to constantly innovate to stay ahead.

examples.sentence: He was the top dog in the rivalry between the two companies, dominating the sector.
examples.translation: He was the person holding the superior position relative to rivals, dominating the sector.

examples.sentence: As the top dog in the group, Maria sets the tone for all activities and decisions.
examples.translation: As the leader in the group, Maria sets the tone for all activities and decisions.

examples.sentence: The team captain is definitely the top dog when it comes to strategy and leadership.
examples.translation: The team captain is definitely the leader when it comes to strategy and leadership.

examples.sentence: The top dog of the department was responsible for overseeing all project deadlines.
examples.translation: The dominant person in the department was responsible for overseeing all project deadlines.

examples.sentence: When the CEO stepped down, the top dog role was passed to the COO.
examples.translation: When the CEO stepped down, the dominant person role was passed to the COO.

examples.sentence: The top dog called the meeting to discuss the company's future plans.
examples.translation: The dominant person called the meeting to discuss the company's future plans.

examples.sentence: Being the top dog means carrying a lot of responsibility and making tough choices.
examples.translation: Being the dominant person means carrying a lot of responsibility and making tough choices.
